programmes.show_description: The Murder Of Samantha Madgin. An 18-year-old new mum was brutally stabbed to death on a night out with friends. She was attacked by a 15-year-old high on drink and drugs. S2, Ep6
The Murder Of Sophie Lancaster. Sophie Lancaster was attacked and brutally beaten by a gang of teenagers who targeted her and her boyfriend just for being different. S2, Ep5
Angel Of Death. When patients at a Texas hospital start mysteriously dying in the intensive care unit, police rely on surveillance footage to track the perpetrator. S8, Ep19
Don't Open The Door. In Texas, on Christmas Eve 2010, a 12-year-old boy vanishes. Police look at those closest to him, but only surveillance footage can reveal the truth. S8, Ep20

Proof of Innocence. A man is convicted of the murder of a little girl snatched during a game of hide-and-seek. After a 20-year campaign, could new DNA evidence set him free? S6, Ep13
Drawing Conclusions. Dismembered human remains are found in a grocery bag on a riverbank - will detectives be able to piece together the victim's identity and catch a killer? S6, Ep14
Rebellion in Paradise. A detailed look and investigation into Macheteros, a clandestine Puerto Rican liberation movement accused of numerous acts of brutal terror. S7, Ep5
Terror For Sale. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep6
Fred Talbot. When arrested for historic sexual offences, TV weatherman Fred Talbot tried to hide the truth in police interviews. His repeated response of 'no comment' speaks volumes. S3, Ep3
Death Pact. In 1990, Chicago experienced a string of bank robberies. As the 'Bearded Bandit' became more sophisticated the FBI surmised that it could be a cop. S5, Ep14
Broken Trust. Greed was the main motivation for the Prince Brothers' killings, firstly for money, then to get rid of those they believed could incriminate them. S5, Ep15
Criminal Enterprise. A masked gunman robs a California bank and escapes after a standoff with police. Months later, when a jeweller is robbed and kidnapped, a tip links the crimes. S5, Ep16
The Power Couple. Andreen has always had her sights set on success. But the more successful Andreen gets, the more threatened her husband Andre becomes. S11, Ep6
Weight Control. Ashley's new confidence enrages estranged husband Terry, who stalks her to a secluded lot, ready to reclaim control in the deadliest way. S11, Ep7
Momma's Boy. An Ohio mother's devotion blinds her to danger. Despite deadly threats, she clings to her violent son, and her love seals the fate she fears most. S11, Ep10
My Brother's Keeper. Tymeir shines as the loving son, but his brother Rodney's jealousy boils over, driving him to a hideous act of violence that tears their family apart. S11, Ep9
Draw A Picture. Elena falls for bad boy Brandon, who poses as a loving father. But his jealousy and violent control soon spiral into devastating consequences. S11, Ep8
Double Take. Living in his CEO wife's shadow proves too much for failed football player Roy Harvison, and the price will be more than one life. S11, Ep4
Keland Hill. When Tiffany Hill is shot dead in her car, her ex-husband, Keland Hill, is the prime suspect. Police uncover the mistake that exposes his intentions. S5, Ep10
I Still Hear Their Screams. After Felisha marries Wesley, she discovers he is selfish and unkind. When she finally leaves him, he exacts the cruellest revenge. S10, Ep14

programmes.show_name: Murder Of Sarah Everard A Faking It Special
programmes.show_description: Sarah Everard's disappearance in March 2021 created panic amongst the women of Britain. Experts closely examine the behaviour of her notorious killer, Wayne Couzens.
Susan Warne. When seemingly healthy John Proctor was found dead at home, police were stumped. But, a woman in his family was hiding a dark secret that lead to his death. S1, Ep1
Sabah Khan. A love triangle between two sisters and one of their husbands led to a shocking murder. Detectives look back at the case that proved love can ruin any family bond. S1, Ep2
Mr. Big. In 2010, 36-year-old barman Dexter Bain was brutally killed during a failed robbery. Detectives use CCTV footage and stage a sting operation to prove who pulled the trigger. S9, Ep1
The Devil's Bathtub. In 2016, father of seven, Craig Rideout, is reported missing after a strange home intrusion. Using surveillance footage, police unravel an unbelievable plot. S9, Ep2

Predators and Parasites. A makeshift coffin conceals a body - can insects help cops identify the corpse? Plus, a parasite expert proves murder when a woman is found in a dumpster. S6, Ep15
Stranger Than Fiction. When homicide investigators meet crime writers, it transpires that real-life stories are often stranger than fiction. S6, Ep16
Death of a Diplomat. The dignity of Embassy Row is shattered as a bomb strapped to the undercarriage of a Chevelle kills a former Chilean ambassador to the US and his wife. S7, Ep7
Deadly Payout. A closer look at real FBI cases - from murders to robberies - with dramatic re-enactments and interviews with agents and forensic scientists who work in the investigations. S7, Ep8
Carol Taggart/Melanie Smith. A neighbourhood dispute leads to devastation for an entire family. Plus, a woman in her mid-fifties disappears. S4, Ep4
Married with Secrets. It is love at first sight for Michelle and Dennis. But soon, the dark past of Michelle's new husband rears its ugly head and ends in a double homicide. S2, Ep3
Lost In Her Secrets. After becoming estranged from her friends, Sheena Gibbs decides to return home to Chicago. But somewhere between home and Iowa, she mysteriously disappears. S11, Ep4
Last Look Of Summer. A young woman is found dead in a Texas landfill. Detectives turn to their only witnesses: video cameras that captured the murderer's attempt to cover his tracks. S3, Ep2
Jesse Matthew. An ex-footballer abducted, raped and murdered two university students five years apart. What were the steps that led to these sinister murders? S1, Ep3
Twice Shy. Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like the perfect couple. But behind the veneer of happiness in home movies lie dark secrets - and an unlikely killer. S4, Ep7
Double Cross. In a small town, the lives of two couples are unravelled by a series of betrayals, deceit and violence. How did a love affair result in a crime of passion? S4, Ep8
So Close To Home. Two years after Ali Lowizter vanishes, police receive a tip that she may have been trafficked. The search turns into a rescue mission but will it bring Ali home? S9, Ep10
Laura Davies And Acid Attack. Judge Rinder examines the case of 21-year-old Laura Davies, who was murdered by her partner when she wanted to end their relationship. S1, Ep1
All That It Seems. A traffic accident on the Interstate near Des Moines, Iowa, kills a young mother. Police use construction work cameras to piece together her final moments. S6, Ep9
Seychelles: A Body In The Park. When the body of a Royal Navy sailor was found in a park in the Seychelles, his parents believed something sinister happened to him the night he died. S1, Ep5
James Fairweather. 15-year-old James Fairweather terrorised a local community with random deadly attacks that left two people dead. What made him carry out such brutal murders? S1, Ep3
